=====[[Trade]]d to the player=====
After becoming {{pkmn|Champion}}, Diantha will appear at [[South Boulevard|Café Soleil]] in [[Lumiose City]]. She will trade a {{p|Ralts}} holding [[Gardevoirite]] for any Pokémon the player has in their [[party]].
